invariants.prompt_workload: fixed prompts file reused across comparable scenarios
invariants.output_length_rule: max_new_tokens fixed except explicit length scenario

scenarios.description: Repository default prompting setup as baseline.
Lower temperature with same fixed output length and workload.
Higher temperature with same fixed output length and workload.
Intentional comparability exception: change output length and temperature together.
Mixed precision inference scenario (requires CUDA bfloat16 support).
